title: scutellaria bolanderi subsp. bolanderi
intro: Scutellaria bolanderi subsp. bolanderi, also known as Bolander's skullcap, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb native to western North America, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, due to its adaptogenic and sedative properties. Bolander's skullcap can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in traditional medicine.
